actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Progress is a dance with a monkey.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Monkeys make more progress than most of us.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The rules for progress are hidden by a deranged God.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll keep moving forward together, never looking back.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll keep moving forward together, trying not to trip over each others' feet.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We know we're not making progress when everyone else has left the floor.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll keep going until we reach the end.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll keep going until we fall into our graves.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Only children know what progress really is.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll keep twirling until we're both dizzy.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll keep twirling until we're both dizzy with progress.
